summary: git mv experiments/met_tail.py -> longtail.py; DEFAULT_DATA switched from the 12-record fixture to experiments/tate_stratified.jsonl so `python3 longtail.py rare` runs with zero arguments after clone. README rewritten around that quickstart. Rename and no-stub decision recorded in DECISIONS.md. All subcommands re-tested post-move (rare --seed 42 reproduces 'trout'/Rebeyrolle; tail/share/tags/show pass; --data override verified against met_fixture.jsonl).
next: Run 10: first post-MVP hardening run — add a small self-test (e.g. `python3 longtail.py selftest` or a tests/ script asserting record count, tag counts, and the seeded rare pick) so regressions are catchable; alternatively fix the known limitation notes (isHighlight always False for Tate) if a cheap highlight proxy emerges.
